# ConnectX

> No networking. No job boards. Just the people you need to start your startup.

ConnectX helps builders and startups find co-founders, early teammates, and the right people to build with — through intent-based matching rather than profile-browsing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What ConnectX is, how it works, and waitlist signup.
- [Find a Co-Founder](/find-a-cofounder): How founders use ConnectX to find a technical or business co-founder.
- [Connects Founders](/connects-founders): How ConnectX connects founders with builders and early teammates.
- [CoFoundersLab Alternative](/cofounderslab-alternative): ConnectX vs CoFoundersLab comparison.
- [App Demo (Free)](/app): Interactive mobile playground showing the free matching experience.
- [App Demo (Premium)](/app/premium): Interactive playground showing Premium features.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Community Guidelines](/community-guidelines): Community rules.
